final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input load,
  input shift,
  input [15:0] din,
  output reg [15:0] dout
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (load) begin
      dout <= din;
    end
    else if (shift) begin
      dout <= {dout[14:0], 1'b0};
    end
  end
  
endmodule
